title: lithocarpus hongiaoensis
intro: Lithocarpus hongiaoensis, also known as Hongiao Chinese corkbark, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family. It is a deciduous tree native to China, and its bark is valued for its medicinal properties. The bark of the Lithocarpus hongiaoensis is used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and bronchitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Lithocarpus hongiaoensis include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to relieve symptoms and promote overall health and well-being.
